notes: Builds CodeAgent (multi-agent LLM system) and evaluates it against baselines (CodeBERT, GPT-3.5/4, COT, ReAct, SOTA code-review tools) on curated datasets across 4 tasks and 9 languages; contributes a new 3,545-item dataset; includes a QA-Checker ablation and a theoretical convergence lemma/proof. Manual vulnerability verification by researchers is ground-truth labeling, not a human-subjects study.
